title: aethionema monospermum subsp. pyrenaicum
intro: Aethionema monospermum subsp. pyrenaicum, commonly known as Pyrenean aethionema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Pyrenean aethionema include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
